star_stories.title: Software Adoption at a 400-Bed Hospital
star_stories.situation: A 400-bed hospital struggled with OR scheduling inefficiencies that were costing time and money across every surgical service line.
star_stories.task: Demonstrate measurable operational improvement using Clinisoft's platform and convert a skeptical perioperative leadership team.
star_stories.action: Conducted workflow mapping sessions, built a structured pilot program, and partnered directly with perioperative leadership to co-design the implementation.
star_stories.result: Reduced OR turnover time by 11 minutes per case, which led to a full-system purchase across the hospital.

job_title: Senior Territory Manager — Advanced Surgical Devices
role_summary: Managed a high-volume surgical territory across North Texas for a manufacturer of minimally invasive vascular and cardiac devices, supporting surgeons in cath labs, ORs, and hybrid suites. Averaged 132% to quota over seven years and won the President's Club Award four times.

star_stories.title: Turnaround Territory — #23 to #3 Nationally
star_stories.situation: Inherited a territory ranked #23 of 24 nationally with declining sales and deteriorating surgeon relationships.
star_stories.task: Reverse the decline, rebuild surgeon engagement, and establish a credible competitive presence in the territory.
star_stories.action: Re-mapped all accounts by potential and relationship status, dramatically increased OR presence, and built a surgeon advisory council to rebuild trust and gather competitive intelligence.
star_stories.result: Territory rose to #3 nationally within 18 months and maintained top-5 status for five consecutive years.

job_title: Regional Sales Director — Western Gulf Region
role_summary: Led a 7-state region covering 140+ hospital accounts and 300+ outpatient clinics for a mid-market diagnostics manufacturer. Managed a team of 9 field reps, 2 clinical specialists, and 1 solutions engineer. Grew regional revenue from $42M to $88M (110% growth) and achieved the #1 region nationally for three consecutive years.

star_stories.title: IDN Contract Win — $14.2M GulfCare Health Partners
star_stories.situation: GulfCare Health Partners sought to consolidate diagnostic platforms across 22 hospitals, with two entrenched competitors already embedded in the system.
star_stories.task: Position Medisynex as the system-wide standard and displace both competitors in a high-stakes, multi-stakeholder enterprise sales cycle.
star_stories.action: Built a cross-functional task force, delivered detailed ROI modeling tailored to each hospital's cost structure, coordinated 11 clinical evaluations across departments, and aligned executive stakeholders at both the IDN and facility level.
star_stories.result: Awarded a 5-year, $14.2M contract, displacing both competitors and increasing regional market share by 27%.
